title: Execution Evidence Record
description: Sandboxed execution evidence produced by the harness. Hand-written files are rejected via HMAC signature validation.

command.description: The CLI command that was executed

wallTimeMs.description: Wall-clock duration of the command in milliseconds

environmentFingerprint.description: Concatenated os type, arch, and node version (e.g. 'win32-x64-v22.14.0')

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of when the evidence was recorded

harnessVersion.description: Semver string of the harness that produced this record

signature.description: HMAC-SHA256 signature over the rest of the record (hand-written files lack this)
